import React from "react"; import matillionlogo from '../assets/images/matillion_logo.png'; import awslogo from '../assets/images/aws_logo.png'; import azurelogo from '../assets/images/azure_logo.png'; import '../assets/styles/Project.scss'; function Project() { return(

Personal Projects

Open Source Python Library

  • Published open-source Python library to interface with Matillion REST API
  • Implemented unit tests in PyTest to validate API responses & improve code coverage
  • Configured CI/CD processes to release code changes, run unit tests and publish documentation using GitHub Actions

Event Driven Data Pipeline

  • Designed scalable, event-driven pipeline in AWS cloud to load and transform raw sales data in Snowflake warehouse
  • Configured event monitor on AWS S3 storage bucket to notify EventBridge when new data file has been created
  • Programmed AWS Lambda function to receive S3 events and triggered Airflow and dbt pipelines to load Snowflake
  • Loaded transformed data to fact and dimensions tables for monthly sales and inventory reporting on AWS Quicksight

Serverless Price Prediction Pipeline in Azure

  • Scraped Airbnb rental prices in NYC & orchestrated code using Cloud Functions
  • Ingested raw files in Blob Storage to populate and query Databricks Metastore
  • Transformed and selected features in PySpark jobs and saved parquetted data
  • Visualized parquetted geo-spatial data on an interactive dashboard in PowerBI

); } export default Project;
